summary: Completed frontend web preview testing for ScriptMate mobile app. Backend health check working. All requested pages load correctly: Home/Index, Dashboard, Auditions (with stats modal), and Self-Tape Studio. The P0 rehearsal bug fix could not be fully verified in web preview as it requires TTS callbacks on native device.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic issue, not affecting functionality
Console warning: expo-av deprecated, will be removed in SDK 54 - not blocking current functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Rehearsal screen fix (lines 407-439, 516-561): Added speakingLineIndexRef and advanceProcessedRef to prevent AI cue loop - good implementation pattern for TTS callback handling
auditions.tsx handleShowStats (line 189-192): Modal opens correctly for all users (free and premium) as expected
selftape/index.tsx navigation (lines 53-69): Navigation to /selftape/prep working with premium gating
Root layout properly handles RevenueCat initialization errors with graceful fallback on web platform

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All tested pages load without errors

test_credentials: N/A - No authentication required for web preview testing
seed_data_creation: None - Using empty state for frontend verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web preview testing completed. All core pages verified: 1) Home page ('/') loads with all feature cards visible 2) Dashboard ('/dashboard') renders correctly with progress tracking 3) Auditions ('/auditions') loads with stats modal working when clicking bar-chart icon 4) Self-Tape Studio ('/selftape') loads with all features visible. The rehearsal screen P0 bug fix (AI cue loop) requires on-device testing to verify TTS callback behavior. RevenueCat is correctly disabled on web platform.

PASS - Shows main feature cards (Self Tape, Auditions, Dashboard, Scripts, Training Modes)
PASS - Shows Daily Progress, Career Momentum, Quick Actions sections
PASS - Shows Audition Tracker with stats, filters, search

notes_on_rehearsal_fix.fix_description: Added speakingLineIndexRef to track which line is being spoken to prevent duplicate TTS calls. Added advanceProcessedRef to ensure advance only happens once per speech cycle. Moved saveProgress before advanceToNextLine to fix variable ordering.
notes_on_rehearsal_fix.verification_status: Cannot fully verify in web preview - requires native device testing with TTS callbacks. Code review indicates correct implementation pattern.
